title: Attach request fields to log events
scenario: Useful logs carry fields such as request_id and attempt count so operators can filter and correlate events.
instructions: Add LogFields with request_id, user_id, and attempt. Update LogEvent so it stores those fields alongside event_name and level.

hints.body: Keep LogLevel from the starter. Add a LogFields struct with request_id: String, user_id: Option<String>, and attempt: u32.
Update LogEvent to include fields: LogFields while keeping event_name and level.
One complete solution for Attach request fields to log events is shown below.

completionExplanation: LogEvent now carries structured request fields that can be filtered and correlated by logging tools.
